question: What are the top origin-destination pairs for the West Region fleet in the last 14 days?
reasoning: SF Embarcadero → Mission District is the West Region's most-run lane at 73 trips — short at 4.9 km but driven by Nakamura (w1) and Oliveira (w2) making multiple daily passes. SFO Cargo → South SF is the critical cargo-offload corridor; flight schedule dependency makes timing critical. The Mission → Potrero micro-run at 3.2 km is the shortest in the region — ideal for EV transition as range anxiety is minimal. Bayview → South SF at 11.7 km is the longest regular lane; Schreiber (w3) drives this exclusively and shows the best fuel efficiency in the region.
